extra.reason: Set kubeflow-profiles/oauth2-proxy chart admin defaults to empty; externalized kiali root_domain to a variable wired from account module. grep clean, hclfmt+fmt clean.

Restricted ml-pipeline-ui AuthorizationPolicy to cluster.local/ns/kubeflow/sa/oauth2-proxy (mirrors dashboard/profiles); removed orphaned ingress.sa value. helm template + lint clean. metadata-grpc-service & service-cache-server kept allow-all (out-of-mesh callers); follow-up filed.

Replaced misleading inbound-cidrs=0.0.0.0/0 comment (grafana, kiali) and added matching accurate comment (dex, dashboard) across all four shared-ALB admin ingresses. Comment-only; value unchanged. terraform fmt clean on all four modules.

Wrapped exec in dynamic block gated on var.kube_data_auth_enabled in common/kube-provider.hcl and common/helm-provider.hcl (apply/flag=true keeps exec token-expiry fix; plan/flag=false drops exec -> kubeconfig fallback). Updated stale description naming the removed aws_eks_cluster_auth data source across all 12 variables.tf. terragrunt hclfmt clean; no aws_eks_cluster_auth references remain.

Moved route53 zone lookup into account module (data.aws_route53_zone.root + output root_zone_id); added mock root_zone_id; rewired dex/prometheus/kiali/kubeflow to consume var.root_zone_id from dependency.account.outputs.root_zone_id instead of their own live lookup. make plan-all now plans all modules cleanly: account does the single live lookup (Z0873790MAHSTW1NBQTC), consumers plan with mock zone_id (acm validation record known-after-apply). terraform fmt + terragrunt hclfmt clean.

All 3 workflows: added 'Install Terraform' step (hashicorp/setup-terraform@b9cd54a v3.1.2, terraform_version from env tf_version=1.9.8, wrapper off) after AWS creds; replaced tofu_version/tf_version action inputs with tf_path: terraform (satisfies action.yml mise-check and makes Terragrunt use the terraform binary; default tfpath is terraform anyway). env renamed tofu_version->tf_version. .tool-versions unchanged (still terraform 1.9.8). YAML validated. Not committed.

Migrated Terragrunt 0.86.2 CLI flags in Makefile (~18 lines) and 3 CI workflows: run-all <cmd> -> <cmd> --all; --terragrunt-non-interactive -> --non-interactive; --terragrunt-include-dir -> --queue-include-dir; --terragrunt-strict-include -> --queue-strict-include; hclfmt --terragrunt-check --terragrunt-diff -> hcl fmt --check --diff. Verified: make plan-all exits 0, 15 units planned, 0 flag/hard errors. YAML valid. Root terragrunt.hcl->root.hcl deferred to platform-amv.

Set TF_VAR_kube_data_auth_enabled=false on the infra-validate-plan Plan step (was true) so the aws_eks_cluster data source stays gated off during greenfield plan, matching make plan-all. apply/destroy keep true (cluster exists then). YAML valid.

Disabled serviceMonitor on awslb-controller chart (removed the 2 set entries + orphaned monitoring_namespace var/input); added prometheus/charts/lb-controller-monitor (metrics Service in kube-system + ServiceMonitor labeled release=prometheus) wired via helm_release.lb_controller_monitor depends_on prometheus. Verified: original 'no matches for kind ServiceMonitor' error gone; awslb renders no ServiceMonitor; helm lint clean; isolated prometheus plan = 6 to add, 0 errors incl lb_controller_monitor; fmt clean.

Rewrote common/kube-provider.hcl + helm-provider.hcl to use var.cluster_endpoint + base64decode(var.cluster_certificate_authority_data) (from eks module outputs, mockable) + always exec; removed the aws_eks_cluster data source and kube_data_auth_enabled. Added cluster_endpoint/cluster_certificate_authority_data vars+inputs to 10 consumers; removed orphan flag var from ebs-csi/efs-csi; stripped TF_VAR_kube_data_auth_enabled from Makefile + 3 workflows. Verified: make plan-all MAKE_EXIT=0, 0 cluster-unreachable errors, 0 hard errors (refreshes applied addons + plans new). fmt + YAML clean.

Added deploy-account/deploy-dex/destroy-account/destroy-dex targets (mirror deploy-prometheus, queue-strict-include) + wired into require-deploy-vars; verified dry-run renders correct terragrunt cmd and guard fires. Rewrote README: required-vars table, Route53 prerequisite, quickstart + corrected per-component order, new Account/Authentication(Dex)/Monitoring sections, *.admin.<domain> access + dex_admin_password login, kubeflow addons+deploy+dashboard URL, teardown, GH Actions vars/secrets, dashboard/ gitignore note. Verified: images exist, all 13 referenced make targets real, all 7 addon dirs exist, TOC anchors consistent.

Makefile: org_name ?= $(ORG_NAME) (reads env, no default); export ORG_NAME := $(shell ... lowercase) using := to avoid recursive-variable error; added require-org guard; require-deploy-vars: require-org and add-cluster: require-org. Verified: org via param and via ORG_NAME env both work (lowercased, no recursion); missing ORG_NAME fails fast on deploy-* and add-cluster; make -n parses clean. README: table now all-three-required + env-backed, export-once recommendation, bare make plan-all/deploy-all.

Live-patched ml-pipeline-ui AuthorizationPolicy to allow cluster.local/ns/ingress/sa/istio-ingressgateway; verified gateway->/pipeline/apis returns HTTP 200 (was 403 'RBAC: access denied'). Made permanent in kubeflow/charts/pipelines: values.yaml ingress.sa=istio-ingressgateway; authorization_policies.yaml ml-pipeline-ui principal uses {{ .Values.ingress.namespace }}/sa/{{ .Values.ingress.sa }}. helm template matches live value; helm lint clean. Corrects platform-jk3 (oauth2-proxy was the wrong caller; gateway routes /pipeline directly to ml-pipeline-ui).

Out of scope: KFP 2.16.1 platform-agnostic-multi-user overlay does not include pipelineversion mutating/validating webhooks nor Pipeline/PipelineVersion CRDs (those are behind a separate feature overlay). Confirmed via rendered baseline /tmp/kfp-2.16.1.yaml (13 CRDs: 8 Argo + 3 metacontroller + scheduledworkflows + viewers).

Extracted all 13 CRDs (8 Argo v3.7.3, 3 metacontroller v4, scheduledworkflows, viewers) from rendered 2.16.1 baseline into chart crds/. All validate via kubectl create --dry-run=client. No pipelines/pipelineversions CRDs in this overlay.

deployments.yaml: 10 component images -> ghcr.io/kubeflow/kfp-*:2.16.1; frontend workaround dropped; MLMD 1.14.0; Argo quay.io v3.7.3 + seccomp; api-server V2_DRIVER/LAUNCHER_IMAGE + OBJECTSTORECONFIG_HOST/PORT(minio); mysql:8.4 args/datadir/securityContext; metacontroller v4.11.22 + probes (stateful_set.yaml).

config_maps.yaml sync.py: visualization_server_image/frontend_image defaults -> ghcr.io/kubeflow/kfp-* (docstring + os.environ fallbacks). frontend also overridden via FRONTEND_IMAGE env in deployments.yaml; visualization uses sync.py default + KFP_VERSION tag (2.16.1).

config_maps.yaml: pipeline-install-config appVersion 2.3.0->2.16.1; argo doc-URL comments v3.4.17->v3.7.3; workflow-controller-configmap executor block gained securityContext (runAsUser 65532 + seccomp) per upstream 2.16.1. Kept minio-service artifactRepository endpoint (minio retained).

Regenerated roles.yaml (9 Roles) + cluster_roles.yaml (15 ClusterRoles) from upstream 2.16.1 (namespace-templated): closes Argo 3.7 RBAC gaps (workflowartifactgctasks, namespaces, serviceaccounts, events, PDBs, agent-ca secret, workflowtaskresults) + pipeline-runner workflowtaskresults + scheduledworkflow/api-server CRD verbs. Added required kfp-launcher + metadata-envoy-configmap ConfigMaps and wired envoy-config into metadata-envoy deployment (new image needs external config). Metacontroller kept on cluster-admin binding (functional). Services/SAs/bindings already complete.
Chart.yaml appVersion 2.3.0->2.16.1, version 1.0.7->1.1.0; main.tf helm_release.kubeflow_pipelines version 1.0.2->1.1.0 (now matches Chart.yaml).

E2E verified on archegos-dev-eks: KFP 2.16.1 stack healthy, sample v2 pipeline ran SUCCEEDED (driver/launcher 2.16.1 + Argo v3.7.3 + MinIO). Reconcile deploy clean (0 changed). Test workflows cleaned up.

KFP chart upgraded 2.3.0->2.16.1 and verified end-to-end on archegos-dev-eks. All 7 implementation subtasks done; sample v2 pipeline ran SUCCEEDED. MySQL+MinIO retained (Postgres->platform-oaz, SeaweedFS->platform-wiz deferred).

Renamed mysql PVC mysql-pv-claim->mysql-pv-claim-v2 (pvc.yaml + deployments.yaml claimName), bumped chart 1.1.0->1.1.1 + TF pin so terraform detects the change. Deployed: new empty PVC bound, MySQL 8.4 inits cleanly (no crash-loop), Helm auto-prunes old PVC (gp2 Delete reclaims volume - no manual step). README updated. Sample pipeline SUCCEEDED on fresh DB (after restarting DB-consuming deploys to re-init schema; in a real version upgrade the api-server image change restarts it automatically).
Restricted ml-pipeline-ui AuthorizationPolicy to oauth2-proxy SA (the real reverse-proxy caller); helm template verified
